title: Auth with headers
excerpt: description: Allow or deny a request based on a known pre-shared key in a header. This is not meant to replace the WebCrypto API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Allow or deny a request based on a known pre-shared key in a header. This is not meant to replace the WebCrypto API. The example code contains a generic header key and value of `X-Custom-PSK` and `mypresharedkey`. To best protect your resources, change the header key and value in the Workers editor before saving your code.
